sentence: 老师让我们写出水的分子式。
pinyin: Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen xiě chū shuǐ de fēn zǐ shì.
english: The teacher asked us to write out the molecular formula for water.

sentence: 每个班组每周要开一次例会。
pinyin: Měi gè bān zǔ měi zhōu yào kāi yī cì lìhuì.
english: Each work team holds a regular meeting once a week.

meaning: to make a complaint or a suggestion to the authorities by letter or by
sentence: 居民通过信访反映了小区的噪音问题。
pinyin: Jūmín tōngguò xìn fǎng fǎnyìng le xiǎoqū de zàoyīn wèntí.
english: Residents reported the noise problem in the neighborhood through the petition system.

sentence: 工作时听轻音乐帮助我集中注意力。
pinyin: Gōngzuò shí tīng qīng yīn yuè bāngzhù wǒ jízhōng zhùyìlì.
english: Listening to light music while working helps me concentrate.

meaning: provisions; supplies; victuals; (literary) to support; to provide for;
sentence: 部队的给养及时送到了前线。
pinyin: Bùduì de jǐ yǎng jíshí sòng dào le qiánxiàn.
english: The troops' supplies were delivered to the front lines on time.

meaning: (neologism) the three core personal values: worldview (世界觀|世界观[shi4 ji
sentence: 找对象最重要的是三观合不合。
pinyin: Zhǎo duìxiàng zuì zhòngyào de shì sān guān hé bu hé.
english: The most important thing when looking for a partner is whether your values align.

sentence: 这位外国领导人下月将正式访华。
pinyin: Zhè wèi wàiguó lǐngdǎorén xià yuè jiāng zhèngshì fǎng huá.
english: This foreign leader will officially visit China next month.

sentence: 备考时多做几套真题很有帮助。
pinyin: Bèikǎo shí duō zuò jǐ tào zhēn tí hěn yǒu bāngzhù.
english: Doing several sets of past exam questions is very helpful when preparing for a test.

sentence: 议员以拉布方式阻止法案通过。
pinyin: Yìyuán yǐ lā bù fāngshì zǔzhǐ fǎ'àn tōngguò.
english: The legislators used a filibuster to prevent the bill from passing.

sentence: 政府对进口商品征税以保护本地产业。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ duì jìnkǒu shāngpǐn zhēng shuì yǐ bǎohù běndì chǎnyè.
english: The government levies taxes on imported goods to protect local industries.

sentence: 第一夫人出席了昨天的慈善晚宴。
pinyin: Dì yī fū rén chūxí le zuótiān de císhàn wǎnyàn.
english: The First Lady attended yesterday's charity dinner.

sentence: 中央银行宣布下调基准利率。
pinyin: Zhōng yāng yín háng xuānbù xià tiáo jīzhǔn lìlǜ.
english: The central bank announced a cut to the benchmark interest rate.

meaning: part (in multipart instrumental or choral music), such as the soprano
sentence: 合唱团分成四个声部练习这首歌。
pinyin: Héchàngtuán fēn chéng sì gè shēng bù liànxí zhè shǒu gē.
english: The choir is divided into four parts to practice this song.

meaning: foreign concession, an enclave occupied by a foreign power (in China i
sentence: 老上海有很多国家在此设立租界。
pinyin: Lǎo Shànghǎi yǒu hěn duō guójiā zài cǐ shèlì zūjiè.
english: In old Shanghai, many countries set up foreign concessions here.

sentence: 那位道士在山上修行了十几年。
pinyin: Nà wèi dàoshi zài shān shang xiūxíng le shí jǐ nián.
english: That Daoist priest has been practicing on the mountain for over ten years.

meaning: 1. to rise in value; 2. to appreciate
sentence: 这套房子买了十年，已经升值了不少。
pinyin: Zhè tào fángzi mǎi le shí nián, yǐjīng shēngzhí le bù shǎo.
english: This apartment was bought ten years ago and has appreciated quite a bit in value.

sentence: 他下楼去拿快递。
pinyin: Tā xià lóu qù ná kuàidì.
english: He went downstairs to pick up his delivery package.

sentence: 门把手松了，需要找人修一下。
pinyin: Mén bǎshǒu sōng le, xūyào zhǎo rén xiū yīxià.
english: The door handle is loose and needs someone to fix it.

sentence: 智商高不代表情商也高。
pinyin: Zhìshāng gāo bù dàibiǎo qíngshāng yě gāo.
english: A high IQ doesn't mean emotional intelligence is also high.

sentence: 这座体育馆的规模十分宏大。
pinyin: Zhè zuò tǐyùguǎn de guīmó shífēn hóngdà.
english: This stadium is enormous in scale.

sentence: 春天来了，公园里遍地都是野花。
pinyin: Chūn tiān lái le, gōng yuán lǐ biàn dì dōu shì yě huā.
english: Spring has arrived, and wildflowers are everywhere in the park.

meaning: 1. hook (on which to hang sth); 2. to couple; 3. to link together; 4.
sentence: 工资与业绩挂钩。
pinyin: Gōngzī yǔ yèjì guàgōu.
english: Salary is linked to performance.

meaning: 1. length; 2. duration; 3. accident; 4. right and wrong; 5. good and b
sentence: 你帮我量一下这块布的长短。
pinyin: Nǐ bāng wǒ liáng yīxià zhè kuài bù de chángduǎn.
english: Could you measure the length of this piece of fabric for me?

sentence: 这种药是胶囊形式的，比较好吞。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng yào shì jiāo náng xíng shì de, bǐ jiào hǎo tūn.
english: This medicine comes in capsule form, which is easier to swallow.

sentence: 古代的官吏必须通过科举考试。
pinyin: Gǔdài de guānlì bìxū tōngguò kējǔ kǎoshì.
english: Ancient officials had to pass the imperial examination.

sentence: 孩子的监护权判给了母亲。
pinyin: Háizi de jiānhù quán pàn gěile mǔqīn.
english: Guardianship of the child was awarded to the mother.

meaning: 1. according to this; 2. on the ground of the above; 3. (formally intr
sentence: 据此，我们决定调整计划。
pinyin: Jù cǐ, wǒmen juédìng tiáozhěng jìhuà.
english: Accordingly, we decided to adjust the plan.

sentence: 他周末经常和客户一起打高尔夫球。
pinyin: Tā zhōumò jīngcháng hé kèhù yīqǐ dǎ gāo ěr fū qiú.
english: He often plays golf with clients on weekends.

meaning: 1. to issue (document, certificate etc); 2. to provide
sentence: 医院为他出具了一份诊断证明。
pinyin: Yīyuàn wèi tā chūjù le yī fèn zhěnduàn zhèngmíng.
english: The hospital issued a diagnostic certificate for him.

meaning: to contain in great quantities; rich in
sentence: 牛奶富含钙质，适合每天喝。
pinyin: Niúnǎi fùhán gàizhì, shìhé měitiān hē.
english: Milk is rich in calcium and good to drink every day.

sentence: 节假日高速公路经常堵车。
pinyin: Jiéjiàrì gāosù gōnglù jīngcháng dǔchē.
english: The highway is often congested on public holidays.

meaning: 1. bronze (alloy of copper 銅|铜 and tin 錫|锡[xī])
sentence: 博物馆展出了一件青铜鼎。
pinyin: Bówùguǎn zhǎnchūle yī jiàn qīngtóng dǐng.
english: The museum displayed a bronze ritual vessel.

meaning: 1. to check; 2. to verify; 3. to audit; 4. to examine
sentence: 出发前请核对一下行李清单。
pinyin: Chūfā qián qǐng héduì yīxià xínglǐ qīngdān.
english: Please check your packing list before departure.

meaning: 1. cast and crew; 2. performers and production team
sentence: 剧组在小镇取景拍摄了三周。
pinyin: Jùzǔ zài xiǎozhèn qǔjǐng pāishèle sān zhōu.
english: The film crew spent three weeks shooting on location in a small town.

sentence: 这批货通过空运明天到。
pinyin: Zhè pī huò tōngguò kōngyùn míngtiān dào.
english: This shipment is coming by air freight and will arrive tomorrow.

sentence: 每个公民都应该守法。
pinyin: Měi gè gōngmín dōu yīnggāi shǒufǎ.
english: Every citizen should abide by the law.

sentence: 工人把楼面打磨得很光滑。
pinyin: Gōngrén bǎ lóumiàn dǎmó de hěn guānghuá.
english: The workers polished the floor until it was very smooth.

sentence: 这位医学家花了十年研究癌症。
pinyin: Zhè wèi yīxuéjiā huāle shí nián yánjiū áizhèng.
english: This medical scientist spent ten years researching cancer.

meaning: 1. to write and direct (a play, film etc); 2. playwright-director; 3.
sentence: 她同时担任这部舞台剧的编导。
pinyin: Tā tóngshí dānrèn zhè bù wǔtái jù de biāndǎo.
english: She serves as both the writer and director of this stage production.

sentence: 请在网上填写报名表单。
pinyin: Qǐng zài wǎngshàng tiánxiě bàomíng biǎodān.
english: Please fill out the registration form online.

sentence: 这个电路里有几个损坏的器件。
pinyin: Zhège diànlù lǐ yǒu jǐ gè sǔnhuài de qìjiàn.
english: There are a few damaged components in this circuit.

sentence: 他去大学医学中心做了全身检查。
pinyin: Tā qù dàxué yīxué zhōngxīn zuòle quánshēn jiǎnchá.
english: He went to the university medical center for a full physical checkup.

sentence: 红、黄、蓝是三种原色。
pinyin: Hóng, huáng, lán shì sān zhǒng yuánsè.
english: Red, yellow, and blue are the three primary colors.

sentence: 对方早就设局，等他上钩。
pinyin: Duìfāng zǎo jiù shèjú, děng tā shànggōu.
english: The other party had already set a trap, waiting for him to take the bait.

sentence: 她喜欢在沙拉里加几颗橄榄。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān zài shālā lǐ jiā jǐ kē gǎnlǎn.
english: She likes to add a few olives to her salad.

sentence: 夏天到了，超市里摆满了新鲜荔枝。
pinyin: Xiàtiān dào le, chāoshì lǐ bǎimǎnle xīnxiān lìzhī.
english: Summer has arrived and the supermarket is full of fresh lychees.

sentence: 窗外飘着大片雪花。
pinyin: Chuāng wài piāozhe dà piàn xuěhuā.
english: Large snowflakes are drifting outside the window.

sentence: 在免税店买香水比较划算。
pinyin: Zài miǎnshuì diàn mǎi xiāngshuǐ bǐjiào huásuàn.
english: Buying perfume at a duty-free shop is quite a good deal.

sentence: 他被确诊为白血病后积极接受治疗。
pinyin: Tā bèi quèzhěn wéi báixuèbìng hòu jījí jiēshòu zhìliáo.
english: After being diagnosed with leukemia, he actively underwent treatment.

sentence: 圆周率是一个著名的数学常数。
pinyin: Yuánzhōulǜ shì yī gè zhùmíng de shùxué chángshù.
english: Pi is a famous mathematical constant.
